notes: I've been playing the game for 5 hours and it runs perfectly. No glitches, frame stuttering, or weird artifacts. Just make sure that when you first load the game and the screen is black, click a few times with your mouse to get it to start. I'm not sure if this is a quirk unique to Proton or if this also happens on Windows.
